creator: keramida@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Sat, 23 May 2009 18:00:17 UT, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@FreeBSD.org> wrote:
> Maintainer of editors/emacs-devel,
> Please note that PR ports/134875 has just been submitted.

> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/134875

Hi Ashish :-)

I think I like the new WITH_SOURCES option but can we keep it separate
from the update to 23.0.93?  I'd prefer keeping version updates a bit
'clean' from other stuff.
